mapper.sql: d.dept_id, d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.dept_short, d.dept_addr, d.dept_phone, d.read_only, d.create_user, d.create_dept, d.create_time, d.update_user, d.update_dept, d.update_time, d.remark
mapper.select:
select t.parent_id, u.user_id, u.user_name,
from sys_dept d left join sys_dept_tree t on d.dept_id = t.dept_id left join sys_user_dept ud on d.dept_id = ud.dept_id and ud.is_leader = 1 left join sys_user u on u.user_id = ud.user_id where 1 = 1
and dept_name like concat('%', #{deptName}, '%')
and dept_phone like concat('%', #{deptPhone}, '%')
order by t.parent_id, t.dept_id

select t.parent_id, u.user_id,
from sys_dept d left join sys_dept_tree t on d.dept_id = t.dept_id left join sys_user_dept u on d.dept_id = u.dept_id and u.is_leader = 1 where d.dept_id = #{deptId}
select t.dept_id id, t.parent_id pid, d.dept_name as label from sys_dept_tree t left join sys_dept d ON t.dept_id = d.dept_id order by t.parent_id, t.dept_id

with recursive tree (dept_id, parent_id) as (select t1.dept_id, t1.parent_id from sys_dept_tree t1 where dept_id = #{deptId} union select t2.dept_id, t2.parent_id from sys_dept_tree t2 join tree on t2.parent_id = tree.dept_id) select distinct tree.dept_id from tree JOIN sys_dept u on tree.dept_id = u.dept_id
select d.dept_id deptId, d.post_id postId, d.is_default isDefault, p.post_name postName from sys_dept_post d left join sys_post p on d.post_id = p.post_id where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_dept_post(dept_id, post_id, is_default)values
(#{item.deptId}, #{item.postId}, #{item.isDefault})
on conflict do nothing

insert into sys_user_dept(user_id, dept_id, post_id, is_default, is_leader) values
(#{item.userId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.postId}, #{item.isDefault}, #{item.isLeader})
on conflict(user_id, dept_id, post_id) do update set is_default = excluded.is_default, is_leader = excluded.is_leader
mapper.select: select dept_id deptId, post_id postId, is_default isDefault, user_id userId, is_leader isLeader from sys_user_dept where dept_id = #{deptId}
select u.user_id userId, u.user_name userName from sys_user u, sys_dept d, sys_user_dept ud where d.dept_code = #{deptCode} and d.dept_id = ud.dept_id and ud.user_id = u.user_id

select ud.id, ud.user_id, ud.dept_id, ud.post_id, ud.is_default, ud.is_leader, u.user_name, u.rank from sys_user u left join sys_user_dept ud on ud.user_id = u.user_id and ud.dept_id = #{deptId} where u.user_id > 1 limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select
from sys_user_dept ud, sys_dept d where d.dept_id = ud.dept_id and ud.user_id = #{userId} order by ud.is_default desc limit 1
